description: Card UI changes (3:4 aspect ratio, color swaps) + i18n fixes for deck group names in setup
steps: In src/components/SeasonCardsModal.tsx, change CARD_TYPE_COLORS: monster becomes bronze '#cd7f32', virtue gets the old monster purple '#9b59b6', upgrade becomes green '#27ae60'. warUpgrade '#e74c3c' and winterUpgrade '#5bc0eb' remain unchanged.

In src/App.css, change .season-card-image-placeholder height from 80px to a value that creates a 3:4 card aspect ratio. The image placeholder should be approximately square or slightly vertical. Change minmax(220px,1fr) in .season-card-grid to approximately 180px to accommodate narrower cards. Adjust .season-card aspect ratio by setting aspect-ratio: 3/4 on the .season-card class or equivalent approach so cards display in 3:4 ratio.

Add translation keys for the 6 deck group names in src/i18n/en.ts: 'deck.archway': 'Archway', 'deck.tower': 'Tower', 'deck.teapot': 'Teapot', 'deck.horseman': 'Horseman', 'deck.ship': 'Ship', 'deck.mountain': 'Mountain'.

In src/components/MainMenu.tsx, replace the raw deck group name {g} with t() calls using the new translation keys. Create a mapping from DeckName to TranslationKey (e.g., const DECK_NAME_KEYS: Record<DeckName, TranslationKey> = { Archway: 'deck.archway', Tower: 'deck.tower', ... }) and use it in the DECK_GROUPS.map rendering.
acceptance_criteria: CARD_TYPE_COLORS monster is '#cd7f32' (bronze), virtue is '#9b59b6' (purple), upgrade is '#27ae60' (green)
Season cards display with 3:4 aspect ratio
Deck group names in setup screen are translated when Spanish is selected
Build passes with npx tsc -b && npx vite build
